ticket.subject: Login fails with correct password
ticket.description: I'm entering my correct password but the system keeps saying invalid credentials. I've tried multiple browsers and cleared my cache. Need urgent access to complete a critical project.

ticket.subject: Incorrect charge on my invoice
ticket.description: My January invoice shows a charge of $199 for a service I never subscribed to. Please investigate this billing error and issue a refund if applicable.

ticket.subject: App crashes when opening settings
ticket.description: The mobile app crashes every time I try to open the settings menu. This started after the latest update. Device: Samsung Galaxy S23, Android 14.

ticket.subject: Feature request: Batch processing
ticket.description: Would be great if we could process multiple items in a batch instead of one at a time. This enhancement would save hours of manual work for our team.

ticket.subject: Bug: Sorting doesn't work correctly
ticket.description: Steps to reproduce: 1) Go to items list 2) Click sort by date 3) Items appear in random order. Expected: Items should be sorted by date. This is a regression from the previous version.

ticket.subject: Can't reset 2FA settings
ticket.description: I lost my phone and can't access my authenticator app. The 2FA recovery process isn't working - the backup codes say they're invalid. I'm locked out of my account completely.

ticket.subject: Payment method update needed
ticket.description: My credit card on file expired. I need to update it to a new card before my subscription renewal date on February 15th to avoid service interruption.

ticket.subject: Slow loading times - unusable
ticket.description: Pages are taking over 30 seconds to load making the application completely unusable. This is blocking our entire team from working. Started this morning around 9 AM.

ticket.subject: Request: Integration with Slack
ticket.description: Our team uses Slack heavily. Having native Slack integration for notifications and commands would be extremely valuable for our workflow. Please consider adding this feature.

ticket.subject: Bug: File preview shows wrong document
ticket.description: When previewing files in the document manager, the wrong file is displayed. Clicking on Document A shows the contents of Document B. This has caused confusion and errors.

ticket.subject: Security concern: Suspicious emails
ticket.description: I received emails claiming to be from your company asking for my password. They look official but the links go to different domains. Please investigate this potential security threat.

ticket.subject: Subscription cancellation request
ticket.description: I would like to cancel my subscription effective at the end of the current billing period. Please confirm the cancellation and let me know if there's any refund available.

ticket.subject: Application error 500 on dashboard
ticket.description: Getting internal server error (500) when accessing the main dashboard. Other pages work fine but the dashboard has been broken for 2 days now. Very frustrating.

ticket.subject: Minor suggestion: Add tooltips
ticket.description: Some icons in the interface are not self-explanatory. Adding tooltips when hovering over them would be a nice cosmetic improvement for usability.

ticket.subject: Account temporarily suspended
ticket.description: My account was suspended without warning. I haven't violated any terms of service. This is impacting my business operations. Please review and restore access immediately.

ticket.subject: Invoice PDF not opening
ticket.description: Downloaded invoices in PDF format won't open - shows file corrupted error. I need these for our accounting records. Tried different PDF readers with same result.

ticket.subject: Feature: Export to Excel format
ticket.description: Currently only CSV export is available. Adding Excel (XLSX) export would make it much easier to work with the data in spreadsheets with proper formatting preserved.

ticket.subject: Bug: Notifications not clearing
ticket.description: Read notifications remain in the notification center even after marking them as read. The badge count also doesn't update. Happens on both web and mobile versions.

ticket.subject: Critical: Data loss after save
ticket.description: I saved a document but when I reopened it, all my changes were gone. This has happened twice now. This is critical as I've lost hours of work. Data loss issue needs immediate attention.

ticket.subject: Question about data retention policy
ticket.description: For compliance purposes, we need to know how long data is retained after account deletion. Also, can we request a complete data export before cancellation?

ticket.subject: SSO login redirect loop
ticket.description: When trying to login with SSO, I get stuck in an infinite redirect loop between your site and our identity provider. Regular login works but SSO is required by our company policy.

ticket.subject: Refund for service outage
ticket.description: There was a 6-hour service outage last week that affected our business significantly. We request compensation or a partial refund for the downtime as per the SLA.

ticket.subject: Request: Nonprofit discount
ticket.description: We are a registered 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. Do you offer any special pricing or discounts for nonprofits? We'd love to use your service but have limited budget.

ticket.subject: Bug: Search results pagination broken
ticket.description: Search returns 100+ results but clicking Next page shows the same first 10 results. Unable to access results beyond the first page. This is affecting our workflow significantly.

ticket.subject: Cannot change account password
ticket.description: The change password feature shows success message but password doesn't actually change. I can still login with old password. This is a security concern and needs to be fixed.

ticket.subject: API rate limiting too aggressive
ticket.description: We're getting rate limited after just 10 requests per minute. The documentation says 100/minute is the limit. This is blocking our integration from working properly.

ticket.subject: Feature: Customizable dashboard
ticket.description: The default dashboard doesn't show the metrics we care about most. A customizable dashboard where users can add/remove/rearrange widgets would be very useful.

ticket.subject: Production environment unavailable
ticket.description: Our production environment has been down for the past 2 hours. All our users are affected. This is causing significant business impact. Please escalate immediately.

ticket.subject: Someday: Multi-language support
ticket.description: Eventually it would be nice to have the interface available in other languages. We have international clients who would benefit from Spanish and French translations.

ticket.subject: Bug: Duplicate webhooks being sent
ticket.description: Our webhook endpoint is receiving duplicate calls for the same event. Each event triggers 3-4 identical webhook calls causing issues in our system. This is a regression bug.
